[{"city":"Paris","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976316-istockphoto-689710224-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976390-istockphoto-135034702-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976428-istockphoto-847408280-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741635794864-AdobeStock_730104594-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"ARRIVE INTO PARIS ","day_summary":"

Welcome to Paris! Today, board your flight to one of the most beautiful and elegant cities in the world—Paris, renowned for its haute couture, world-famous museums, breathtaking monuments, and sensational cabarets. Upon arrival, collect your baggage and proceed outside, where you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide. Your guide will assist you and escort you to your hotel, ensuring a smooth check-in process. Once settled, relax and unwind in the comforts of your hotel, preparing for the exciting journey ahead. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":32,"h_name":"NOVOTEL EST - BAGNOLET","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hostel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/NOVOTEL EST - BAGNOLET/1738757354303-2017-11-09.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/NOVOTEL EST - BAGNOLET/1738757354303-2020-02-19.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"GUIDED CITY TOUR OF PARIS - EIFFEL TOWER 3RD (TOP) LEVEL - VISIT THE PALACE OF VERSAILLES ","day_summary":"

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let Travelxploria’s expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Geneva","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Geneva/1741006790061-istockphoto-693272348-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Geneva/1741006790113-istockphoto-1080669470-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Geneva/1741006790167-istockphoto-1322200482-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"ORIENTATION TOUR OF GENEVA ","day_summary":"

Check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic journey to Switzerland, a breathtaking Central European paradise known for its majestic Alps, pristine lakes, and picturesque villages. With the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy a seamless and comfortable transfer as you head towards Geneva, one of the world’s most cosmopolitan cities. Upon arrival, set out on an enlightening orientation tour of Geneva, where you will witness The Jet d'Eau, a stunning fountain that stands as the city's iconic landmark. Continue to the United Nations Office, a symbol of global diplomacy, before visiting the beautiful Flower Clock, a unique floral masterpiece situated near the tranquil Lake Geneva.After exploring Geneva’s renowned sights, proceed to your hotel for a smooth check-in experience, expertly coordinated by Travelxploria’s dedicated support team. Unwind and relax in the comfort of your hotel, preparing for more adventures ahead. Overnight stay at a hotel in Geneva.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Paris","to":"Geneva","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1308,"h_name":"Geneva Marriott Hotel","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Geneva","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Geneva/Geneva Marriott Hotel/1744119902214-exterior (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Geneva/Geneva Marriott Hotel/1744119902351-mc-gvamc-mh-gvamc-028-17886-86823_Feature-Hor.jpeg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Geneva/Geneva Marriott Hotel/1744119902400-426609611.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"FULL DAY EXCURSION TO THE TOP OF EUROPE- THE AMAZING JUNGFRAUJOCH ","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. packages.package_name: European Odyssey Exploring Iconic Landmarks and Hidden Gems
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let our expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary

Enjoy some leisure time shopping for renowned Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates. To conclude the day, relax on a scenic cruise across the stunning Lake Lucerne, surrounded by picturesque alpine landscapes. Return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria has curated the perfect Swiss adventure for you

 After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara

This morning, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with Travelxploria – the best travel agency ensuring a seamless experience. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, take a walking tour through this historic city, immersing yourself in its rich culture and artistic heritage. Marvel at Florence’s most iconic landmark – the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, home to the famed Gates of Paradise. Stroll through the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air museum filled with stunning Renaissance sculptures, surrounded by historic cafés, and dominated by the majestic Palazzo Vecchio. Walk across the renowned Ponte Vecchio, the ancient bridge spanning the Arno River, lined with charming shops and boutiques. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. Overnight stay at the hotel in the Tuscany region

packages.package_name: Majestic Europe Holiday
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

Enjoy the best on-ground support as you are comfortably transferred to your hotel, catching glimpses of London’s iconic landmarks along the way. With our expert guidance get ready to explore a city brimming with royal heritage, cultural wonders, and unforgettable experiences.

​After a delightful breakfast, set out on an exhilarating city tour with your Travelxploria representative and expert guide, ensuring a seamless experience. Explore London’s most iconic landmarks, including Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Trafalgar Square, and the majestic Tower Bridge. Witness the grandeur of Buckingham Palace and, if lucky, experience the iconic Changing of the Guard ceremony. Cricket enthusiasts will relish an exclusive visit to Lord’s Cricket Ground, delving into its rich history, the Pavilion, and the legendary Ashes Urn, followed by a delicious lunch at this historic venue. Later, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views from the London Eye, offering a spectacular perspective of the city skyline and the River Thames. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris with your expert Travelxploria representative. Witness the grandeur of Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, the iconic Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Return to Paris for a sumptuous dinner before unwinding at your hotel.Overnight stay in Paris.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Magical Day at Disneyland & Enchanting Paris","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before venturing into the wonders of Disneyland Paris. Choose between two captivating parks—Disney Park, where fairy tales come to life with thrilling rides, vibrant parades, and beloved Disney characters, or Walt Disney Studios Park, offering breathtaking stunt shows and behind-the-scenes movie magic. After a delicious lunch, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, gliding past Paris’ most iconic landmarks. As night falls, embark on the enchanting Paris by Night tour, witnessing the illuminated Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, and Champs-Élysées. End this magical day with a sumptuous dinner before retiring to your hotel. Overnight stay in Paris.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

packages.package_name: The Ultimate European Tour England, Scotland, and Paris
packages.overview:
A Classic Journey Through England, Scotland, and Paris

Embark on a captivating journey with Travelxploria through the heart of England, Scotland, and Paris. Begin your adventure in London, England's dynamic capital, where iconic landmarks like the Tower of London, Big Ben, and the Buckingham Palace await. Stroll along the River Thames, explore the historic Westminster Abbey, and enjoy a delightful experience at the British Museum.

Next, journey north to Scotland, where you’ll discover the enchanting Edinburgh. Visit the historic Edinburgh Castle, perched on an extinct volcano, and wander along the charming Royal Mile. Enjoy the breathtaking views from Arthur's Seat and explore the city’s vibrant arts scene. Continue your Scottish adventure with a visit to Glasgow, known for its rich cultural heritage and beautiful architecture.

Crossing into France, your final stop brings you to the romantic allure of Paris. Experience the majesty of the Eiffel Tower with its panoramic views of the city, then stroll along the Champs-Élysées to the Arc de Triomphe. Visit the world-famous Louvre Museum, home to iconic art pieces, and explore the historic Notre-Dame Cathedral. Take a scenic boat ride along the Seine River, and indulge in the city's vibrant cafés and charming streets.

This unforgettable adventure through England, Scotland, and Paris offers a perfect blend of history, culture, and scenic beauty, creating lasting memories that will stay with you long after the journey ends.

As Scotland’s capital and one of the most vibrant cities in Northern Europe, Edinburgh’s monumental center has been declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The castle overlooks the city’s steep streets and parks. We’ll enjoy a panoramic tour with a local guide.

Today, we have an exciting journey through the Scottish Highlands ahead of us, starting with a coffee and a stroll in Pitlochry, a charming village. Next, we’ll pass through Inverness in northern Scotland, near the mysterious Loch Ness. After, we´ll visit Urquhart Castle (admission included) from where we´ll embark on a boat ride on the dark waters of Loch Ness. Next, we’ll pass by Fort Augustus with its sluice system and Fort William, a tourist center at the foot of Ben Nevis, the highest summit in the United Kingdom. Heading south, we’ll travel through the high plateaus, where snow is often visible, and skirt the picturesque shores of Loch Lomond. We’ll arrive in Glasgow at the end of the day.

Your Travelxploria guide will pick you up from the designated meeting point for an unforgettable journey through Scotland’s breathtaking landscapes. Begin in Oban, a charming coastal town famous for its harbor, fresh seafood, and scenic island views. Then, venture into the dramatic valley of Glencoe, where you’ll learn about its tragic history tied to the 1692 massacre. Take in the serene beauty of Highland lochs, including Loch Awe and Loch Lomond. Visit iconic castles like Kilchurn Castle, and immerse yourself in tales of ancient battles and Scotland’s rich heritage with Travelxploria’s expert storytelling and seamless service.

packages.package_name: Mesmerizing Europe Tour
packages.overview:
• Iconic Paris Landmarks: Marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Champs Elysées, Place Vendôme, and the majestic Palace of Versailles.

  • Disneyland Fun & Seine Cruise: Thrilling rides at Disney Park, and a romantic, scenic cruise along the iconic River Seine.

  • Enchanting Geneva: Explore Geneva’s landmarks like Jet d'Eau, UN Buildings, and the picturesque Flower Clock with travelxploria’s expert guide.

  • Jungfraujoch - Top of Europe: Reach 11,333 feet to experience stunning snow-covered peaks and breathtaking panoramic views of Aletsch Glacier.

  • Mt. Titlis & Lucerne: Enjoy thrilling cable car rides and captivating views from Mt. Titlis, followed by a scenic tour of Lucerne.

  • Lindt Chocolate & Rhine Falls: Discover the world of Swiss chocolate at Lindt, and witness the awe-inspiring power of Rhine Falls.

Enjoy the best on-ground support as your expert tour manager escorts you to your luxurious hotel. Check in and relax in comfort, preparing for the magical journey ahead. Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris, curated by travelxploria, the best travel agency for a seamless experience. After a delicious breakfast, discover the finest Parisian landmarks, including Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, the Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, the fashionable Champs Elysées, the Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, and Les Invalides. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch as you continue your journey. Then, ascend to the 3rd level of the iconic Eiffel Tower for a breathtaking panoramic view of the city. End the day with a visit to the magnificent Palace of Versailles. Overnight stay in Paris. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Magical Day at Walt Disney Studios Park & Romantic Seine Cruise","day_summary":"

Today, immerse yourself in the magic of Disneyland Paris with travelxploria, the best travel agency. Choose your adventure between Disney Park, where fairy tales come alive across five incredible lands, filled with classic attractions, parades, and beloved Disney Characters, or visit the Walt Disney Studios Park, where you can witness thrilling stunt shows, experience film-making magic, and explore real-life movie sets. After the excitement, enjoy a romantic cruise on the River Seine, gliding past iconic Parisian landmarks like Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, Louvre, and the Orsay Museum.Overnight stay at the hotel in Paris. (Breakfast, Packed Lunch, Dinner)

Delve into Geneva’s role on the world stage with a visit to the International Quarters, home to the United Nations and the Red Cross Headquarters. Get ready for a magical alpine journey to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a highlight of your trip with Travelxploria. Begin your day with a scenic transfer to Grindelwald Terminal, where you’ll board the new 3S-Bahn Eiger Express for a quick 15-minute ride to Eigergletscher Station. From there, hop onto a cogwheel train that takes you to the highest railway station in Europe, perched at 11,333 feet. Explore the Ice Palace, where ice artists create breathtaking masterpieces, and visit the Sphinx Observatory Deck for panoramic views of the majestic Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps.Overnight stay at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

Titlis & Lucerne: A Scenic Alpine Adventure","day_summary":"

Today, experience the breathtaking beauty of Mt. Titlis, reaching an exhilarating 3,020 meters with Travelxploria, your expert travel partner. Ride various cable cars, including the world’s first revolving cable car, Rotair, and enjoy a stunning 360-degree panoramic view of snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine snowy fields. Don’t miss the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge, offering unparalleled views. Later, enjoy an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of Switzerland’s most picturesque cities. Visit the Lion Monument, Kapell Brucke, and shop for Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates before embarking on a scenic cruise on Lake Lucerne.Overnight stay at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Lindt Home of Chocolate & Rhine Falls Adventure","day_summary":"

Today, embark on a delightful journey through Switzerland and Liechtenstein. Start with a scenic ride aboard the Vaduz Mini Train, winding through the charming capital. Then, return to Zurich and immerse yourself in indulgence at the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where a magnificent chocolate fountain and interactive exhibits showcase the artistry behind Swiss chocolate-making. Continue to the Rhine Falls, Europe's largest and most stunning waterfall. Take an exhilarating boat ride for a thrilling close-up of the cascading waters, creating a mesmerizing spectacle amid beautiful natural surroundings.Overnight at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Bidding Farewell to Europe","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable European holiday with Travelxploria comes to an end, it’s time to bid farewell to the beautiful destinations and the wonderful new friends you’ve made. After a final breakfast, check out from your hotel and depart for the airport, carrying with you cherished memories of breathtaking landscapes, rich culture, and exceptional experiences. This European adventure will remain in your heart for a lifetime. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again for your next unforgettable journey!

packages.package_name: Scenic European Journey
packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable 16-day European adventure that takes you through some of the continent's most iconic cities and cultural hubs. Begin your journey in the historic heart of Rome, exploring its ancient wonders before heading to the romantic canals of Venice. Continue on to the scenic beauty of Zurich, then immerse yourself in the timeless elegance of Paris, including a stop in the charming city of Rouen. Cross the Channel to experience the royal charm of London, and make your way through Colchester to the vibrant streets of Amsterdam, the Dutch capital. Conclude your grand tour with a visit to dynamic Berlin, blending rich history with modern energy, before departing with memories to last a lifetime.​

In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, an excellent introduction to Rome. Here, you’ll find a variety of restaurants offering Italian, Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Embark on a half-day city tour of Paris, where you’ll explore some of the most iconic landmarks that define this enchanting city. Start by marveling at the majestic Eiffel Tower, followed by a stroll along the Champs-Élysées to reach the Arc de Triomphe. Admire the stunning architecture of the Louvre Museum and the beautiful Notre-Dame Cathedral. After soaking in the essence of Paris, you’ll head towards Rouen, a picturesque town in Normandy known for its medieval charm. En route, enjoy the scenic views of the French countryside before arriving in Rouen, where you’ll explore its stunning Gothic Rouen Cathedral and stroll through the cobblestone streets of its historic center. This excursion offers a perfect blend of Parisian elegance and the rustic allure of Normandy.

Immerse yourself in the local culture with a guided tour of Berlin, the incredible capital of Germany. We’ll visit the historic center, the Museum Island, the Reichstag, the Brandenburg Gate, and the city’s main shopping streets and magnificent parks. After the tour, we´ll stop at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, offering insights into the city’s challenging history during the 20th century. Immerse yourself in the rich history and culture of Berlin with Travelxploria, where every moment is made seamless by our experienced tour guide and dedicated on-the-ground support team. Your day kicks off with a guided tour of the historic center, where you’ll marvel at the Museum Island, Reichstag, Brandenburg Gate, and stroll through Berlin’s elegant shopping streets and magnificent parks. Our knowledgeable guide will bring the city's story to life, sharing fascinating insights at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, providing a deeper understanding of Berlin’s complex history. With our Travelxploria representative on hand, you’ll feel fully supported throughout the day, ensuring a stress-free experience. After the tour, enjoy some free time to explore the city at your own pace. As evening falls, dive into the vibrant Kantstrasse area, where a variety of international cuisines awaits, making for the perfect end to a memorable day.

packages.package_name: London & Edinburgh Discovery Urban Life and Scenic Escapes
packages.overview:
• Arrive in the iconic British capital and settle into your hotel.

  • Discover London’s top sights and enjoy breathtaking views from the London Eye.

  • Explore the picturesque villages of the Cotswolds and the historic charm of Oxford.

  • Visit royal castles, ancient wonders, and Roman heritage in a day.

  • Witness stunning coastal views and explore Canterbury’s rich history.

  • Enjoy a scenic train ride to Scotland’s historic capital.

  • Discover the fascinating history of Edinburgh Castle with a guided visit.

  • Experience the beauty and mystery of Scotland’s most iconic landscapes.

  • Say goodbye to Edinburgh and depart with unforgettable memories.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

packages.package_name: The Wonders of Spain and Portugal
packages.overview:
Spain

  • Cultural Heritage: World-class museums (Prado in Madrid), iconic architecture (Gaudí’s Park Güell in Barcelona).

  • Historic Cities: Seville (Flamenco, Alcázar Palace), Granada (Alhambra Palace), Toledo (medieval charm).

  • Coastlines: Costa Brava, Balearic Islands, and Canary Islands offer stunning beaches and water activities.

  • Cuisine: Famous dishes like paella, tapas, and jamón ibérico; vibrant food culture.

  • Festivals: La Tomatina, San Fermin (Running of the Bulls), and Semana Santa (Holy Week).

Portugal

  • Charming Cities: Lisbon (Alfama, Baixa), Porto (wine cellars, riverside charm).

  • Historical Landmarks: Belém Tower, Jerónimos Monastery in Lisbon, Pena Palace in Sintra.

  • Coastline: Algarve (cliffs, golden beaches), Azores and Madeira (lush landscapes, natural beauty).

  • Cuisine & Wine: Known for Port wine, bacalhau (salted cod), and pastéis de nata (custard tarts).

  • Cultural Experiences: Fado music, rich maritime history, Age of Discovery significance.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Granada","country":"Spain","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Granada/1744968952827-AdobeStock_95394957-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Madrid & Proceed Towards Granada","day_summary":"

Welcome to your tour. We will depart from Madrid early in the morning, heading south through La Mancha. Our first stop will be in Puerto Lápice, a charming Manchego village evocative of Don Quixote. We will then continue into Andalusia via Despeñaperros, arriving in Granada, where lunch will be included. In the afternoon, if you have chosen the option that includes a visit to the Alhambra, we will explore the magnificent Alhambra Palace and its beautiful Generalife Gardens, both built during the Arab period, with a local guide.

Departure from Granada. We´ll head towards the Costa del Sol. First stop, Malaga, where we´ll have time for a stroll through its historic district, famous for its cathedral and the Picasso Museum. Afterward, we´ll proceed along the coastal highway, enjoying picturesque views of the Mediterranean. Puerto Banús, in Marbella, is a stunning and sophisticated recreational harbor. In the afternoon, we´ll continue our journey through the mountains listening to stories of bandits before reaching Ronda, a picturesque white town known for its cliffside location and a deep canyon that divides the town. Finally, Seville. We’ll arrive in the evening.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a city tour of Seville, where you´ll visit the cathedral with its famous Giralda, explore the banks of the Guadalquivir River, and wander through the popular neighborhoods of Santa Cruz and Triana. After the tour, enjoy a relaxing boat ride on the Guadalquivir River offering stunning panoramic views (included). In the evening, you´ll have the option to attend a popular flamenco tablao.

Discover the best of Seville with Travelxploria on a guided tour of its most iconic landmarks. Explore the magnificent Seville Cathedral, home to Christopher Columbus’ tomb, and climb the Giralda Tower for breathtaking city views. Step into the enchanting Royal Alcázar, a masterpiece of Moorish architecture filled with stunning gardens and intricate designs. Wander through the picturesque Santa Cruz neighborhood, where narrow streets and charming courtyards reveal the city’s rich history. With expert guidance and seamless organization, Travelxploria ensures an immersive and unforgettable journey through Seville’s vibrant culture, fascinating history, and architectural wonders.

We´ll depart from Seville amidst delightful landscapes of gentle mountains and vast pastures as we head towards Extremadura. In Mérida, admission is included to the Archaeological Ensemble of Mérida, which features a Roman Theater and Amphitheater. This site is renowned for its excellent preservation and its designation as a World Heritage Site. There will be time to enjoy lunch and explore the lively pedestrian historic center, bustling with restaurants. Continuing into Portugal, we´ll arrive in Évora, another UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its white streets, Renaissance palaces, and cathedral. Free time will be available to explore.

Today we´ll travel amidst the beautiful landscapes of Alentejo. We´ll stop in Marvão, a very picturesque walled town that offers a fantastic panoramic view of the region. After that, we´ll get to know Castelo de Vide with its impressive castle. We´ll also have time to walk through its old Jewish quarter, where we can visit the medieval synagogue (now a museum) or explore the winding streets of the town. After lunch, we´ll continue to Tomar, a city renowned for the Convent of Christ, a former castle-convent that belonged to the Order of the Templars (admission included). Before arriving in Fátima, we´ll stop in Aljustrel, the village where the three young shepherds who witnessed Virgin Mary´s apparitions were born. We´ll have the opportunity to see Lucia´s house. Upon arrival in Fátima, you´ll have free time at the Sanctuary of Fátima, where you can watch the candlelight procession if you wish (not held in winter). Dinner will be included.

We’ll travel to the north of Portugal. Arriving around 11:00 a.m. in Porto, the country’s second-largest city, we’ll begin with a sightseeing tour (included) of the historic center situated on the banks of the Douro River. We’ll also visit one of its old wineries (included). You’ll have free time to explore the city at your leisure.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Fátima","to":"Porto","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":739,"h_name":"Holiday Inn Porto - Gaia","h_country":"Portugal","h_city":"Porto","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Porto/Holiday Inn Porto - Gaia/1741171255939-2023-01-03.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Porto/Holiday Inn Porto - Gaia/1741171256093-2021-04-27.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Porto/Holiday Inn Porto - Gaia/1741171256102-2020-11-16 (1).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Coimbra","country":"Portugal","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Coimbra","day_summary":"

Today, we´ll experience the stunning landscapes of northern Portugal. We´ll begin with a stroll through Braga, known as the religious capital of Portugal, with its historic cathedral. Next, we´ll ascend to the Sanctuary of Bom Jesus on the world´s oldest cable car, enjoying beautiful views. Afterward, we recommend you descend via the impressive staircase. Guimarães, Portugal´s first capital, awaits with its magnificent Palace of the Dukes. After lunch amidst picturesque vineyards, we´ll descend into the Douro Valley, passing by Sabrosa, the birthplace of Magellan. In Pinhão, we´ll explore its charming train station adorned with traditional tiles and enjoy a one-hour cruise along the Douro River, showcasing the region´s beauty (from November to March, the cruise is not available, so it will be replaced with a scenic drive with stops at viewpoints along the Douro River). Finally, we´ll continue to Coimbra, arriving at the end of the day. Dinner will be included.

We´ll spend time in Coimbra, the third largest city in Portugal known for its old University and charming, steep streets. Continuing southward, we´ll stop at the Batalha Monastery (entrance fee included), an impressive medieval mausoleum of kings. There will be time for lunch and a stroll in Nazaré, a town of fishermen and a seaside resort. We´ll take the elevator that ascends to the old city (tickets included), offering impressive views of the ocean. As we travel towards Lisbon, we´ll make a stop in Óbidos, one of the most beautiful towns in Portugal, with its picturesque white streets adorned with flowers. We´ll arrive in Lisbon.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a sightseeing tour of Lisbon, exploring the Portuguese capital of the seven hills, with its charming alleys, iconic tiles, the feeling of ¨saudade,¨ and the beautiful Atlantic light. We’ll also visit the Belem neighborhood, from where the great Portuguese navigators set sail to cross the oceans in the 15th century. Free time in the afternoon to walk and go to the Bairro Alto and its viewpoint; if you’d like to, you could take an optional trip to the towns of Sintra, Cascais and Estoril. In the evening, we’ll return to the hotel from the lively Restauradores Square, filled with vibrant bars and cafes.

Wander through the charming Alfama district, known for its narrow streets, Fado music, and historic charm, and take in breathtaking views from São Jorge Castle.

packages.package_name: Exploring the Heart of Spain and Portugal
packages.overview:
Embark on a spectacular 15-day journey through the heart of Portugal and Spain, expertly curated by Travelxploria. Begin in the vibrant city of Lisbon, where you’ll be greeted with a warm welcome and transferred to your hotel. Uncover the historic charm of Jerónimos Monastery and the cobbled streets of Alfama before heading to the sunny shores of Albufeira. Travel inland to the Roman-rich town of Évora, and make your way to the sacred site of Fátima, a significant pilgrimage destination.

Your journey continues as you head to Porto, where a scenic half-day tour along the Douro River awaits. Cross into Spain and indulge in a delightful winery tour in Santiago de Compostela. Immerse yourself in the medieval charm of Oviedo, before relaxing in the coastal beauty of Santander. Then, explore the Basque Country, with stops in the dynamic cities of Bilbao or San Sebastián, each known for their artistic flair and unique charm.

In Barcelona, marvel at Gaudí’s masterpieces and stroll through the historic Gothic Quarter, followed by a grand finale in Madrid, where the Royal Palace, Prado Museum, and Retiro Park await your discovery. With Travelxploria, your adventure through these two incredible countries will leave you with unforgettable memories, enriching your spirit and broadening your horizons. After an incredible journey, your comfortable transfer will bring you to the airport, where you’ll depart with a heart full of cherished experiences.

We’ll depart early for southern Portugal, enjoying beautiful landscapes as we cross the long bridge over the Tagus River. Upon arrival in the Algarve, the southern region of Portugal, we´ll explore the historic city of Lagos, known for its port from where Portuguese ships once sailed to Brazil, and its charming historic center enclosed within ancient walls. There will be time for lunch. In the afternoon, we´ll travel to the westernmost point of continental Europe amidst windswept cliffs to discover Cape St. Vincent. Nearby, we´ll have the opportunity to photograph the historic Sagres fortress. Later, we´ll spend time in Albufeira, a stunning coastal city where you can relax on its beaches or wander through its lively historic center. Accommodation will be provided in Albufeira or a neighboring city in the Algarve.

We´ll continue our journey towards the Alentejo region, starting with Mértola, a town-museum on the banks of the Guadiana River. This walled town, an important center from the Muslim era, is dominated by its large castle that invites us to stroll through its streets lined with white houses and corners full of history. Next, we´ll head to Beja, one of the oldest cities in the country famous for its large fortress of Roman and medieval origin. We´ll have time to walk around and enjoy lunch in the historic center, with its narrow streets and picturesque squares. Our journey will continue to Évora, where we´ll visit the Chapel of Bones (admission included), a unique chapel constructed with more than 5,000 skeletons. We´ll then explore this walled city, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, known for its medieval palaces, Gothic religious buildings, and ancient Roman temple.

Arriving around 11:00 a.m. in Porto, the country’s second-largest city, we’ll begin with a sightseeing tour (included) of the historic center situated on the banks of the Douro River. We’ll also visit one of its old wineries (included). You’ll have free time to explore the city at your leisure

Today, we´ll travel through stunning landscapes. In Braga, we´ll take a ride on the world’s oldest water-operated cable car to reach the Sanctuary of Bom Jesus, where breathtaking views await. After exploring the sanctuary, we recommend descending via its picturesque staircase. Our journey continues into Galicia, where we´ll visit the historic town of Cambados in Rías Baixas. Here, we´ll embark on a glass-bottom boat trip along the Ría de Arousa, learning about mussel and oyster production. Enjoy wine and mussel tasting onboard. At lunchtime, we´ll arrive in Santiago de Compostela for a city tour led by a local guide, exploring its medieval streets and renowned pilgrimage sites dating back to the Middle Ages

We’ll travel along the Way of St. James, beginning with Lugo. Here, we’ll have time to explore the historic town center and its Roman walls, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Next, we’ll visit O Cebreiro, a charming Galician stone village. Our journey will continue to León, where we’ll arrive at lunchtime. In León, we’ll visit the magnificent Gothic cathedral, renowned for its stained-glass windows, and enjoy a stroll through the historic town center.

We’ll then cross the Cantabrian Range on our way to Asturias, arriving in Oviedo by evening. We’ll include a tour of the city with a local guide, either upon arrival or the following morning. During this hour-and-a-half tour, we’ll visit the 9th-century cathedral, the Calatrava Congressional Palace, Campoamor Theatre, and Calle de la Rua.

We’ll travel to the Picos de Europa (Peaks of Europe). Our journey will begin with a visit to the Basilica of Covadonga. From there, we´ll follow the coastline to Santillana, one of Spain’s most beautiful towns with an intact medieval quarter. We´ll also visit the Altamira Cave Museum (tickets included), located nearby. Later, we’ll head to Santander, the capital of the region, a coastal city offering stunning views of both mountains and beaches. A panoramic tour with a local guide is included, allowing us to explore this elegant coastal city and its beautiful bay.

packages.package_name: Morocco & Spain: An Enchanting Adventure
packages.overview:
• Hassan II Mosque – A majestic architectural masterpiece by the sea, boasting the world’s tallest minaret with laser beams pointing to Mecca.
  • El Jadida’s Citadel (Mazagan) – A UNESCO-listed Portuguese fortress with charming streets, ancient walls, and a Manueline-style church.
  • Essaouira Medina – A stunning coastal fortress with whitewashed houses, artistic alleys, and dramatic ocean waves crashing against its walls.
  • Jemaa el-Fnaa Square – The heart of Marrakech, alive with storytellers, snake charmers, vibrant souks, and mouthwatering street food.
  • Ouzoud Falls – Northern Africa’s tallest waterfalls, where you’ll enjoy a boat ride, scenic vistas, and playful wild macaques.
  • Fez Medina – Morocco’s cultural soul, an intricate labyrinth of souks, tanneries, and palaces transporting you to a bygone era.
  • Tangier – A captivating city where Africa and Europe meet, with bustling souks and panoramic views over the Strait of Gibraltar.
  • Seville Cathedral & Giralda – A towering Gothic wonder with breathtaking city views from its iconic bell tower.
  • Córdoba Mosque-Cathedral – A mesmerizing blend of Islamic and Christian artistry, with grand arches and intricate Moorish designs.
  • Consuegra Windmills – Legendary La Mancha landscapes featuring Don Quixote’s iconic windmills, standing tall against the Spanish plains.

[{"city":"Casablanca","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Morocco","day_summary":"

Welcome to Morocco! As you arrive at the airport, our friendly Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you with a warm welcome. You’ll be comfortably transferred to your hotel, where you can unwind and soak in the first impressions of this vibrant country. Take your time to relax after your journey, and later in the day, our guide will reach out to ensure you’re well-prepared for the adventure ahead.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Mohammed V International Airport","to":"Casablanca","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":707,"h_name":"Best Western Plus Casablanca City Center","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Casablanca","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Best Western Plus Casablanca City Center/1741160528250-MZ_04__.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Best Western Plus Casablanca City Center/1741160528323-bedroom_1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Best Western Plus Casablanca City Center/1741160528357-2022-10-26.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Safi","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Departure from Casablanca & Arrival at Safi","day_summary":"

This morning, we’ll start with an included guided tour of Morocco’s largest city and economic center. We’ll stroll along the grand avenues, visit the beautiful Mohamed V Square with its fountain, Moorish buildings, and palm trees, and walk through the Arab League Park. We’ll also explore the little Medina. Our tour includes admission to the impressive Hassan II Mosque (the only mosque in Morocco open to non-Muslims), located by the sea and featuring a 210-meter-high minaret with laser lights pointing to Mecca. After the tour, you’ll have free time for lunch in the pleasant maritime area of La Corniche. After lunch, we’ll travel to El Jadida. Its citadel (Mazagan) is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, built by the Portuguese in the early sixteenth century. We’ll stroll through its picturesque streets, which retain many traces of the Portuguese era, such as the Manueline-style Church of the Assumption. We’ll also include a visit to the old sixteenth-century cistern. After exploring, our journey will continue to Safi, arriving in the late afternoon. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Casablanca","to":"Safi","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":708,"h_name":"Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Safi","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Safi/Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi/1741160643758-unnamed (81).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Safi/Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi/1741160643834-unnamed (80).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Safi/Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi/1741160643870-DSC09136.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Agadir","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Departure from Safi & Arrival at Agadir","day_summary":"

With our guide, we’ll visit Safi, a city renowned for its ceramics, highly prized throughout Morocco for their quality and bright colors. We’ll photograph the Castle of the Sea and its impressive fortress walls, stroll through the charming Medina, and visit the Hill of the Potters with its many shops.


Afterward, we’ll continue to Essaouira. Its walled Medina, facing the sea, is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This beautifully preserved city is a favorite among artists and painters. You’ll have free time for lunch and to wander through its narrow streets, whitewashed houses, and strong walls struck by the waves.


After lunch, we’ll continue along the Atlantic coast, taking in the magnificent landscapes. We’ll make a brief stop in Taghazout, a picturesque small town known for its fishing and popular with surfers. Then, we’ll proceed to Agadir for accommodation, arriving in the evening. Dinner will be included.

In the morning, you’ll have free time to enjoy the most popular beach destination in the country. Take some time to relax on one of its endless beaches, stroll along the seafront, or shop in its many retail areas.


After lunch, we’ll continue our journey along a scenic highway through the Atlas Mountains to Marrakech. After arriving at the hotel, you will be able to experience a traditional Kalesa ride up to Jemaa el-Fnaa square, famous for its lively and nonstop atmosphere. Dinner will be included.

Today, we´ll explore one of the most fascinating places in the world, the city that gave Morocco its name. Our city tour will take us through its strong walls, the bustling Jemaa el-Fnaa square, the Medina, the Koutoubia Mosque, and the Bahia Palace (tickets included). Afterward, you´ll have free time for lunch (included) and to relax by the pool or in the hotel garden, or to shop in the souks. In the evening, you can join the Fantasy Party, an optional excursion.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Fes","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer to Fes","day_summary":"

A long journey awaits us: we’ll depart early for the Ouzoud Falls, a tranquil spot in Morocco, home to the highest waterfalls in Northern Africa (110 meters). Nestled in the Middle Atlas, these falls are framed by spectacular gorges. We’ll enjoy a short boat trip and have lunch at a restaurant with a stunning view of the waterfalls (both included). You’ll have fun watching the macaques (Moroccan monkeys) that live in the area. We’ll then continue to the Southern Atlas, arriving in Fes. Before heading to the hotel, we’ll take in the view of the city from the Marinid tombs (depending on the sunlight, this visit may be scheduled for the following day). Dinner will be included.

After lunch, we’ll leave for Castilian lands. We’ll make a stop in Consuegra, where 12 giant windmills next to the castle overlook the La Mancha plain. We’ll visit the Rucio Mill (tickets included) and head to Madrid at the end of the day.

packages.package_name: Legendary Tour of Morocco, Spain & Portugal
packages.overview:
• Morocco: A land of contrasts, where the bustling souks and ancient medinas of cities like Marrakech and Fes meet the vastness of the Sahara Desert. Explore vibrant markets, historic palaces, and the stunning Atlas Mountains. Morocco is famous for its unique blend of Arab, Berber, and French influences.

  • Spain: Known for its lively culture, stunning architecture, and delicious cuisine, Spain offers everything from the artistic wonders of Barcelona and Madrid to the flamenco rhythms of Seville. Don't miss the beautiful beaches of Costa Brava and the historic allure of Andalusia.

  • Portugal: A country of stunning coastline, charming cities, and rich maritime history. Lisbon offers a mix of traditional and contemporary culture, while Porto is famous for its wine and scenic riverfront. The Algarve region boasts picturesque beaches, and the beautiful landscapes of Madeira and the Azores are perfect for nature lovers.

[{"city":"Casablanca","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Welcome to Casablanca","day_summary":"

Welcome to Morocco! As you step off the plane, our Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you with a warm smile, ensuring a smooth transfer to your hotel. Take in the vibrant energy of Casablanca as you settle in and unwind after your journey. You’ll have some time to relax before embarking on this unforgettable adventure. Later in the day, our guide will personally connect with you, providing all the details for the days ahead. To make your first evening truly special, enjoy a delicious, included dinner.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Mohammed V International Airport","to":"Casablanca","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":706,"h_name":"Oum Palace Hotel & Spa","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Casablanca","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Oum Palace Hotel & Spa/1741160429915-2023-04-12.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Oum Palace Hotel & Spa/1741160429995-20180818_201459.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Oum Palace Hotel & Spa/1741160430033-37.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Safi","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Safi Arrival & Stay","day_summary":"

This morning, we’ll start with an included guided tour of Morocco’s largest city and economic center. We’ll stroll along the grand avenues, visit the beautiful Mohamed V Square with its fountain, Moorish buildings, and palm trees, and walk through the Arab League Park. We’ll also explore the little Medina. Our tour includes admission to the impressive Hassan II Mosque (the only mosque in Morocco open to non-Muslims), located by the sea and featuring a 210-meter-high minaret with laser lights pointing to Mecca. After the tour, you’ll have free time for lunch in the pleasant maritime area of La Corniche. After lunch, we’ll travel to El Jadida. Its citadel (Mazagan) is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, built by the Portuguese in the early sixteenth century. We’ll stroll through its picturesque streets, which retain many traces of the Portuguese era, such as the Manueline-style Church of the Assumption. We’ll also include a visit to the old sixteenth-century cistern. After exploring, our journey will continue to Safi, arriving in the late afternoon. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Casablanca","to":"Safi","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":708,"h_name":"Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Safi","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Safi/Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi/1741160643758-unnamed (81).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Safi/Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi/1741160643834-unnamed (80).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Safi/Hôtel Atlantique Panorama Safi/1741160643870-DSC09136.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Agadir","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Visit to Agadir & Stay","day_summary":"

With our guide, we’ll visit Safi, a city renowned for its ceramics, highly prized throughout Morocco for their quality and bright colors. We’ll photograph the Castle of the Sea and its impressive fortress walls, stroll through the charming Medina, and visit the Hill of the Potters with its many shops.


Afterward, we’ll continue to Essaouira. Its walled Medina, facing the sea, is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This beautifully preserved city is a favorite among artists and painters. You’ll have free time for lunch and to wander through its narrow streets, whitewashed houses, and strong walls struck by the waves.


After lunch, we’ll continue along the Atlantic coast, taking in the magnificent landscapes. We’ll make a brief stop in Taghazout, a picturesque small town known for its fishing and popular with surfers. Then, we’ll proceed to Agadir for accommodation, arriving in the evening. Dinner will be included.

In the morning, you’ll have free time to enjoy the most popular beach destination in the country. Take some time to relax on one of its endless beaches, stroll along the seafront, or shop in its many retail areas.


After lunch, we’ll continue our journey along a scenic highway through the Atlas Mountains to Marrakech. After arriving at the hotel, you will be able to experience a traditional Kalesa ride up to Jemaa el-Fnaa square, famous for its lively and nonstop atmosphere. Dinner will be included.

Today, we´ll explore one of the most fascinating places in the world, the city that gave Morocco its name. Our city tour will take us through its strong walls, the bustling Jemaa el-Fnaa square, the Medina, the Koutoubia Mosque, and the Bahia Palace (tickets included). Afterward, you´ll have free time for lunch (included) and to relax by the pool or in the hotel garden, or to shop in the souks. In the evening, you can join the Fantasy Party, an optional excursion.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Fes","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Fes Arrival & Stay","day_summary":"

A long journey awaits us: we’ll depart early for the Ouzoud Falls, a tranquil spot in Morocco, home to the highest waterfalls in Northern Africa (110 meters). Nestled in the Middle Atlas, these falls are framed by spectacular gorges. We’ll enjoy a short boat trip and have lunch at a restaurant with a stunning view of the waterfalls (both included). You’ll have fun watching the macaques (Moroccan monkeys) that live in the area. We’ll then continue to the Southern Atlas, arriving in Fez. Before heading to the hotel, we’ll take in the view of the city from the Marinid tombs (depending on the sunlight, this visit may be scheduled for the following day). Dinner will be included.

This site is renowned for its excellent preservation and its designation as a World Heritage Site. You´ll have time for lunch and a stroll through the vibrant pedestrian historic center, filled with restaurants and local charm. We will then continue to Portugal, stopping in Évora, another World Heritage Site, known for its whitewashed streets, Renaissance palaces, and cathedral. We’ll arrive in Lisbon in the evening.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a sightseeing tour of Lisbon, exploring the Portuguese capital of the seven hills, with its charming alleys, iconic tiles, the feeling of ¨saudade,¨ and the beautiful Atlantic light. We’ll also visit the Belem neighborhood, from where the great Portuguese navigators set sail to cross the oceans in the 15th century. Free time in the afternoon to walk and go to the Bairro Alto and its viewpoint; if you’d like to, you could take an optional trip to the towns of Sintra, Cascais and Estoril. In the evening, we’ll return to the hotel from the lively Restauradores Square, filled with vibrant bars and cafes.

With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, explore iconic landmarks such as the Belém Tower, Jerónimos Monastery, and the Monument to the Discoveries. Wander through the charming Alfama district, known for its narrow streets, Fado music, and historic charm, and take in breathtaking views from São Jorge Castle.

packages.package_name: Canals, Cobblestones & Beer Halls: A Northern Europe Trilogy
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant Dutch capital.

  • Explore Amsterdam’s highlights with a guided city and scenic canal tour.

  • Enjoy a traditional Dutch countryside day trip.

  • Travel to Frankfurt and unwind in the city.

  • Discover Frankfurt’s blend of modern architecture and historic charm.

  • Journey to Munich, the heart of Bavaria.

  • Visit two fairytale castles nestled in the Bavarian Alps.

  • Explore medieval Rothenburg and the unique Ries crater region.

  • Depart from Munich with unforgettable memories of your European adventure.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Amsterdam","country":"Netherlands","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630270-istockphoto-1768484817-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630372-istockphoto-937057490-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630429-istockphoto-615718444-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Amsterdam ","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at the airport, you will be greeted by a representative and transferred to your hotel. Take time to relax and settle in after your journey. Embark on a captivating day trip from Munich to Rothenburg ob der Tauber and the Nördlinger Ries. Begin with a scenic drive to Rothenburg, a beautifully preserved medieval town known for its half-timbered houses, cobblestone streets, and charming old-world atmosphere. Stroll through the historic town center, visit the medieval walls, and explore unique shops and cafes. Continue to the fascinating Nördlinger Ries, a vast crater formed by a meteorite impact 15 million years ago. Discover the quaint town of Nördlingen, built within the crater, and learn about its unique geological history. This day offers a perfect blend of culture and nature.

packages.package_name: Best of Amsterdam, Berlin & Prague
packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

packages.package_name: From Canals to Castles: Amsterdam, Berlin & Prague
packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

packages.package_name: Melodies of the Alps: Switzerland & Austria Unfolded
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Switzerland’s financial hub and settle in for your Alpine adventure.

  • Explore the scenic landscapes of Heidiland and the tiny principality of Liechtenstein.

  • Discover the medieval town of Stein am Rhein and Europe’s largest waterfall.

  • Travel to the heart of the Austrian Alps via a scenic train ride.

  • Step into a dazzling world of art and crystals in Wattens.

  • Journey to Mozart’s birthplace and Austria’s cultural capital.

  • Visit the iconic hilltop fortress offering panoramic views of Salzburg.

  • Enjoy the breathtaking lakeside village and its postcard-perfect alpine setting.

  • Travel to Germany’s vibrant Bavarian capital.

  • Discover historic sites, grand architecture, and local charm in Munich.

  • Bid farewell to Central Europe with unforgettable memories.

","day_summary":"

Embark on a mesmerizing adventure through Switzerland’s breathtaking landscapes and the enchanting Principality of Liechtenstein with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for unforgettable experiences. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will lead you through the picturesque Swiss countryside that inspired Heidi’s timeless tale in Maienfeld. Wander through charming villages, lush meadows, and stunning alpine scenery before crossing into Vaduz, the heart of Liechtenstein. Here, marvel at the royal castle, historic sites, and unique cultural gems of this tiny yet fascinating country. Blending Swiss natural beauty with Liechtenstein’s rich heritage, this seamless and enriching journey promises an unforgettable day of exploration. With Travelxploria, every moment is crafted for the best experience.

After breakfast in Zurich, check out from your hotel and head to the train station for a scenic journey to Innsbruck, the heart of the Austrian Alps. The train ride is a visual treat, winding through picturesque valleys, alpine villages, and snow-capped mountain ranges. Embark on a picturesque day trip from Salzburg to the fairytale village of Hallstatt, often considered one of the most beautiful places in Austria. Travel through the stunning Salzkammergut region, passing serene lakes and alpine landscapes. Upon arrival in Hallstatt, explore its charming narrow streets, colorful lakeside houses, and historic sites like the Bone House and Market Square. Enjoy a peaceful walk along Lake Hallstatt or take a boat ride for panoramic views. Don't miss the Hallstatt Skywalk for breathtaking vistas. This magical destination offers a perfect blend of natural beauty, history, and tranquility before returning to Salzburg in the evening.

packages.package_name: Timeless European Tale
packages.overview: This incredible journey begins with your arrival in Berlin, where you’ll dive into the city's rich history on a guided city tour. From there, you'll travel through Germany, stopping in Wolfsburg and Celle before reaching Hanover, known for its stunning parks and historical landmarks. Next, you'll head to Eisenach, home to the famed Wartburg Castle, and then to Leipzig, a city with a deep musical heritage. After exploring Leipzig, you'll travel to Prague, where you’ll wander through its picturesque Old Town, the majestic Prague Castle, and along the Vltava River. The adventure continues to Budapest, with a stop in Lednice to explore its stunning chateau and gardens. In Budapest, you’ll visit architectural gems like the Buda Castle and Parliament Building. The journey then leads you through Bratislava and Trencin to Krakow, where you'll experience its medieval charm and poignant history, including a visit to the Auschwitz-Birkenau memorial. From Krakow, you’ll head to Warsaw, Poland’s vibrant capital, before traveling to Poznan with its lively Old Town. Finally, you’ll return to Berlin before your departure, bringing this enriching European adventure to a close.

Berlin's vibrant energy and eclectic mix of old and new will set the stage for your upcoming adventure. This first day is a chance to unwind, soak in the city's atmosphere, and prepare for a full day of exploration tomorrow as you dive deeper into the heart of Germany's capital.

Immerse yourself in the local culture with a guided panoramic tour of Berlin, the captivating capital of Germany. We’ll see the historic center, Museum Island, the Reichstag, the Brandenburg Gate, the shopping streets and the city’s beautiful parks. Our visit will also include stops at the Holocaust Memorial and the Berlin Wall Memorial Museum. For an optional excursion, you can visit Potsdam and its stunning palaces.

Immerse yourself in the rich history and culture of Berlin with Travelxploria, where every moment is made seamless by our experienced tour guide and dedicated on-the-ground support team. Your day kicks off with a guided tour of the historic center, where you’ll marvel at the Museum Island, Reichstag, Brandenburg Gate, and stroll through Berlin’s elegant shopping streets and magnificent parks. Our knowledgeable guide will bring the city's story to life, sharing fascinating insights at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, providing a deeper understanding of Berlin’s complex history. With our Travelxploria representative on hand, you’ll feel fully supported throughout the day, ensuring a stress-free experience. After the tour, enjoy some free time to explore the city at your own pace. As evening falls, dive into the vibrant Kantstrasse area, where a variety of international cuisines awaits, making for the perfect end to a memorable day.
